sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76025" key="ou)rotome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὐροτομέω</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἵππον</foreign> <sense id="n76025.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dock a</tr_> horse's <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tail</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
